# PhonePe Contact support changes - 12th April 2024

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: April 14, 2024 6:23 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: May 6, 2024 9:14 AM
Owner: Saksham Srivastava

# **What problem are we solving?**

1. PhonePe has sent a requirement to stop lead leakage due to Volt support number available on the landing page. 
2. Number of junk inbound calls has increase 4x

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

For PhonePe users

1. User should not see the
    1. “Need help?” text
    2. 9611749097 
    3. WhatsApp logo
2. Users should not see the internal “Need Help?” pill until the screen where user has fetched from one RTA successfully.
The pill should be available in screens post first successful fetch.
